name: Mathis Pimparé
about:

If you want to check what I'm working on, you have my GitHub and LinkedIn right there !

name: Owais Batti
about: First-time open-source contributor learning Git, GitHub, and web dev one commit at a time.

name: Thomas Chant
about:
I build JSON Swiss, an in-browser toolkit for formatting, validating, repairing, and exporting JSON, and Numberblocks
    Generator, a fan-made browser playground for playing and comparing Numberblocks-style generator versions on
    numberblocksgenerator.net.

resources.title: Convert JSON to table online, review every row faster, and edit data in a clean JSON to Table view. Free, local, and built for readable JSON table workflows.
resources.text: JSON to Table - Convert JSON to Table Online | JSONSwiss

resources.title: Free online JSON repair tool. Automatically fix missing quotes, trailing commas, bracket mismatches, single quotes, and escape issues. Supports local repair first with AI-assisted deep repair for more complex payloads.
resources.text: JSON Repair Tool - Fix Invalid JSON | JSONSwiss

resources.title: Convert JSON to Excel (XLSX, XLS, CSV) instantly. Features live table preview, nested data flattening, and secure client-side processing for large files.
resources.text: JSON to Excel Converter Online | JSONSwiss

resources.title: Play multiple Numberblocks Generator versions online including Main Generator, 1 to Infinity, Scratch, and Websim. Free fullscreen playable generator.
resources.text: Numberblocks Generator Online - Play Main, 1 to Infinity & Scratch

resources.title: Use the Numberblocks Playground to play a fan-made number block generator online, compare versions, and open kid-friendly browser play guidance.
resources.text: Numberblocks Playground - Play Number Block Generator Online
